# GitHub repository settings (set once in repo **About** section)

Use these values in [github.com/tmohammad78/pattern-lab](https://github.com/tmohammad78/pattern-lab) → **About** (gear icon):

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Description** | Snapp Pay internal algorithm pattern learning platform (NeetCode-style) |
| **Website** | https://snapppay-pattern-lab.vercel.app |
| **Topics** | `nextjs` `react` `typescript` `snapp-pay` `algorithms` `learning-platform` `pattern-lab` |

## Releases

Version tags are published on push:

- [v0.2.0](https://github.com/tmohammad78/pattern-lab/releases/tag/v0.2.0) — progress sync, catalog, UI polish
- [v0.1.0](https://github.com/tmohammad78/pattern-lab/releases/tag/v0.1.0) — initial release

The **Publish GitHub releases** workflow creates release pages for any tag that does not have one yet. Run it manually from **Actions** if needed.
